# fly_wireguard_token (Resource)

Manages a delegated WireGuard token for a Fly.io organization. Import using org_slug/token_name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_wireguard_token" "ci" {
  org_slug = "my-org"
  name     = "ci-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the token. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org_slug` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier (org_slug/name).
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated token value. Only available at creation time.
